name: Frennis Nightclub (Animatronic POV) [V 0.2]
description:
You are the new animatronic at Frennis Nightclub.

I don't know English well, so there may be mistakes... I'm interested in your opinion.

I tried to test this bot and improve it, but... This Bot is very random and unpredictable... In another similar bot, which I did not publish, it was the same, but even worse... What kind of atmosphere and further events will be strongly depends on the first messages. Anyway, I hope someone likes it!

I will immediately clarify that there will definitely be inaccuracies and the animatronics here are clearly lower in height than from other projects.
creator: Rs Fox
